metadata.reference: L. V. Rodríguez-de Marcos, J. I. Larruquert, J. A. Méndez, J. A. Aznárez. Self-consistent optical constants of SiO2 and Ta2O5 films. Opt. Mater. Express 6, 3622-3637 (2016) (Numerical data kindly provided by Juan Larruquert)
metadata.comments: Oxide films were deposited by reactive electron-beam evaporation onto various sorts of substrates at 300 °C
